Bash(D:/CC/ml_zoo/.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import mlflow
mlflow.set_tracking_uri\('sqlite:///D:/CC/ml_zoo/mlflow.db'\)
client = mlflow.tracking.MlflowClient\(\)
exp = client.get_experiment_by_name\('navigation-sac'\)
runs = client.search_runs\(exp.experiment_id, order_by=['start_time DESC'], max_results=3\)
for r in runs:
    print\('Run:', r.data.tags.get\('mlflow.runName'\), '| frames:', int\(r.data.metrics.get\('n_frames', 0\)\)\)
    for k in ['episode/success_rate','episode/n_success','episode/n_done','episode/mean_reward','loss_qvalue','loss_actor','entropy','grad_norm_0']:
        if k in r.data.metrics:
            print\(f'  {k}: {r.data.metrics[k]:.4f}'\)
    print\(\)
" 2>/dev/null)

import mlflow
mlflow.set_tracking_uri\('sqlite:///D:/CC/ml_zoo/mlflow.db'\)
client = mlflow.tracking.MlflowClient\(\)
exp = client.get_experiment_by_name\('navigation-sac'\)

print\('Run:', r.data.tags.get\('mlflow.runName'\), '| frames:', int\(r.data.metrics.get\('n_frames', 0\)\)\)
for k in ['episode/success_rate','episode/n_success','episode/n_done','episode/mean_reward','loss_qvalue','loss_actor','entropy','grad_norm_0']:
